## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD changes

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide (ESLint + Prettier pass)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally (`npm run validate`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] The build and security audit succeed (`npm run ci:check`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass locally when UI/routing changed (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile viewport (375px)
- [ ] I have checked accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen reader)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes (if applicable)
